name: Black Hole
description: A strategic 2-player game of gravity and calculation. Place your numbered tiles on the triangular grid and try to keep your highest numbers away from the final empty circle!

rules.title: The Board
rules.desc: The game is played on a triangular board of 21 circles (6 rows).

rules.title: Placing Tiles
rules.desc: Players take turns placing their numbered tiles (1 to 10) onto empty circles.

rules.title: Increasing Order
rules.desc: You place tiles in ascending order (first turn places tile 1, second turn tile 2, up to 10). A preview of your next tile is shown when hovering.

rules.title: The Black Hole
rules.desc: When all 20 tiles are placed, exactly one empty circle will remain. This empty circle becomes the Black Hole.

rules.title: Scoring
rules.desc: All tiles immediately adjacent to the Black Hole are sucked in. The numbers on those tiles are summed for each player.

rules.title: Low Score Wins
rules.desc: The player with the lower sum of adjacent tiles wins. If a player has no adjacent tiles, their sum is 0. If sums are equal, the game is a tie.

name: Connect Four
description: A classic 2-player connection game. Drop colored discs into a 7x6 grid, and be the first to form a horizontal, vertical, or diagonal line of four of your own discs!

rules.title: Drop Discs
rules.desc: Players take turns dropping a colored disc of their color (Blue/Red) from the top into any of the 7 columns.

rules.title: Gravity Mechanics
rules.desc: The disc will fall straight down to the lowest unoccupied space within the chosen column.

rules.title: Forming a Line
rules.desc: Connect four of your discs in a line—horizontally, vertically, or diagonally—to win.

rules.title: Tie Game
rules.desc: If all spaces are filled without any player connecting four discs, the game ends in a tie.

name: Dots and Boxes
description: A classic two-player pen-and-paper game. Connect dots to complete boxes; capturing a box gains you a point and grants you an extra turn!

rules.title: Draw Lines
rules.desc: Players take turns drawing a single horizontal or vertical line between two adjacent dots on the grid.

rules.title: Claiming Boxes
rules.desc: If you draw a line that completes a 1x1 box, you claim that box. It colors in with your color and adds 1 point to your score.

rules.title: Extra Turn
rules.desc: Every time you complete a box, you MUST immediately take another turn, allowing you to potentially chain multiple completions!

rules.title: Winning
rules.desc: The game ends when all 16 boxes are claimed. The player with the most boxes (highest score) wins.

name: Battleship
description: A strategic 2-player grid-guessing game. Place your fleet on a 10x10 grid, take turns calling shots, and sink all of your opponent's ships to win!

rules.title: Phase 1: Position Fleet
rules.desc: Secretly place your 3 ships (Cruiser of size 3, Destroyer of size 2, and Patrol Boat of size 2) on your 6x6 grid. Select a ship and click the grid. Press Spacebar or orientation toggle to rotate. Click 'Deploy Fleet' once fully placed.

rules.title: Phase 2: Engage Combat
rules.desc: Take turns choosing target coordinates on the opponent's grid to shoot.

rules.title: Shot Indicators
rules.desc: Hits are marked with red pins (💥) and misses are marked with white pins (⚪). Complete ship sinkings will be announced.

rules.title: Victory Condition
rules.desc: The first player to sink all 3 of the opponent's ships (7 total hits required) wins the battle.

name: Checkers
description: A classic 2-player strategy game. Capture your opponent's pieces by jumping over them on an 8x8 board. Mandatory jumps, king promotion, and chain captures included!

rules.title: The Board
rules.desc: 8x8 board with dark and light squares. Each player starts with 12 pieces on the dark squares of their side.

rules.title: Movement
rules.desc: Regular pieces move diagonally forward one square. Kings (promoted pieces) can move diagonally in any direction.

rules.title: Capturing
rules.desc: Jump over an adjacent opponent's piece to an empty square beyond to capture it. Captures are MANDATORY — if you can capture, you must.

rules.title: Multi-Jump & King Promotion
rules.desc: After a capture, if the same piece can capture again, it must continue (chain capture). When a regular piece reaches the opponent's back rank, it becomes a King.

rules.title: Winning
rules.desc: You win by capturing all of your opponent's pieces or leaving them with no legal moves.

name: Bingo
description: A classic multiplayer Bingo game for 2-8 players. The host draws numbers, and players mark their cards. First to complete a row, column, or diagonal shouts BINGO!

rules.title: Players
rules.desc: 2 to 8 players can join. One player is the host who draws the numbers.

rules.title: Your Card
rules.desc: Each player gets a unique 5x5 Bingo card with numbers. The center space is FREE (auto-daubed).

rules.title: Drawing Numbers
rules.desc: The host clicks 'Draw Number' to randomly pick a number from 1-75 that hasn't been drawn yet.

rules.title: Daubing
rules.desc: When a number is drawn, click on that number on your card to daub (mark) it.

rules.title: Calling BINGO
rules.desc: If you daub all 5 cells in a row, column, or diagonal, click the BINGO! button to win. The server validates your card.
